# Delivery Templates

## Kickoff Call Agenda (15 min)

- Intro & rapport
- Project scope review (audit/MVP/full)
- Timeline & milestones
- Communication: Slack/email, weekly updates
- Q&A

## Audit Report Template

```markdown
# Automation Audit Report — {{client}}

## Overview
- Current processes reviewed
- Pain points

## Opportunities
1. {{opportunity 1}} — Impact: high, Effort: low
2. {{opportunity 2}} — Impact: medium, Effort: medium
...

## Recommended Stack
- agent-core, automation-engine, trading-lab (custom)

## Next Steps
- Proposal attached
- Questions?

*Generated by GBOYEE AI Automation.*
```

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Set up repo (private) with GSD structure
- [ ] Create config (from client YAML)
- [ ] Implement task(s) using automation-engine or agent-core
- [ ] Add tests (unit + integration)
- [ ] CI workflow (GitHub Actions)
- [ ] Documentation: README, usage examples
- [ ] Deploy to staging (if applicable)
- [ ] Client review & feedback
- [ ] Production deployment
- [ ] Handoff

## Handoff Document

```markdown
# Handoff — {{project}}

## What Was Built
- Summary
- Repo link
- How to run locally and in production
- Test instructions

## Support Window
- 1 week post‑delivery via email/Slack
- Bug fixes included; new features billable

## Maintenance (optional)
- Monthly retainer: $X for updates, monitoring

Thank you!
```

## Invoice Template (Stripe/HelloSign)

```
# Invoice

Bill to: {{client}}
From: GBOYEE AI Automation
Date: {{date}}
Due: 14 days

Item                      | Qty | Price   | Total
--------------------------|-----|---------|--------
{{Service description}}   | 1   | $X,XXX  | $X,XXX
Tax (0%)                  |     |         | $0

Total: $X,XXX

Payment: wire/crypto/Stripe
```

---

*Keep it simple. Ship fast.*
